done.description: The key setup is ready. You can still adjust shortcuts, ignored apps, data import, and window behavior in Preferences later.
done.title: Welcome to EcoPaste

ignoreApps.description: Choose source apps that should not be recorded. Password managers, key tools, or temporary windows are good candidates; apps on the right will not be written to clipboard history.
ignoreApps.title: Set Ignored Apps

legacyImport.cardDescription: EcoPaste scans the old default data directory in read-only mode. It will not modify or import anything here.
legacyImport.description: Keep only the minimum information needed for the import decision, then choose normal items, favorite items, or both.
legacyImport.noImportableNote: A legacy directory was found, but no importable history database is available yet.
legacyImport.safeNote: Import only reads the legacy item types you checked. Unchecked types stay out of the current database.
legacyImport.title: Legacy Data

description.macos: On macOS, EcoPaste needs Accessibility and Full Disk Access for the core workflow.
description.windows: On Windows, EcoPaste needs administrator launch for some system-level workflows.

accessibility.description: Used for quick paste, window control, and more reliable system interactions.
accessibility.title: Accessibility

fullDiskAccess.description: Used to read required local data and access system-protected app resources.
fullDiskAccess.title: Full Disk Access

runAsAdministrator.description: Reserved for elevated system capabilities. The actual integration will be added after Windows device testing.
runAsAdministrator.title: Run as Administrator

shortcuts.description: Set common shortcuts. You can change them in Preferences at any time.

openClipboard.description: Open the clipboard history window from anywhere.
openClipboard.title: Open Clipboard

shortcuts.title: Set Shortcuts

welcome.description: A cross-platform clipboard manager that helps you search, organize, and reuse copied content faster.

capture.description: Automatically records text, images, and files so important content does not need to be copied again.
capture.title: Auto Capture

reuse.description: Use shortcuts, previews, and quick actions to send common content back into your workflow.
reuse.title: Fast Reuse

search.description: Find history quickly by keyword, type, and source app.
search.title: Instant Search

welcome.title: Welcome to EcoPaste
